title: palicourea longistipulata subsp. longistipulata
intro: Palicourea longistipulata subsp. longistipulata, also known as the 'Long-stipulate Palicourea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Palicourea longistipulata subsp. longistipulata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and fighting infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
